description: Benchmark tasks for symptom-first retrieval workflows

tasks.title: Authentication Bug Report
tasks.description: User reports: 'Login fails with 500 error after session timeout. Only happens when refreshToken is expired and user clicks remember-me checkbox.'

inputs.taskText: Login fails with 500 error after session timeout. Only happens when refreshToken is expired and user clicks remember-me checkbox.

tasks.title: Stack Trace — Indexing Crash
tasks.description: Indexer crashes on large TypeScript file with deeply nested generics

inputs.stackTrace:
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'kind')
    at extractSymbols (src/indexer/treesitter/extractSymbols.ts:142:35)
    at processFile (src/indexer/file-scanner.ts:89:20)
    at indexRepo (src/indexer/index-repo.ts:67:12)

tasks.title: Stack Trace — Slice Build OOM
tasks.description: Slice build runs out of memory on repos with >5000 symbols

inputs.stackTrace:
RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded
    at beamSearch (src/graph/slice/beam-search.ts:45:10)
    at buildSlice (src/graph/slice.ts:167:22)

tasks.title: PR Description — Add Caching
tasks.description: PR: 'Add LRU cache for symbol card lookups to reduce DB round-trips during slice building'

inputs.taskText: Add LRU cache for symbol card lookups to reduce DB round-trips during slice building. Changes to graph/slice.ts and db/ladybug-queries.ts.

tasks.title: Bug Report — Config Not Loading
tasks.description: User reports: 'SDL-MCP ignores my config file when SDL_CONFIG env var is set to a relative path'

inputs.taskText: SDL-MCP ignores my config file when SDL_CONFIG env var is set to a relative path. Config loading should resolve relative paths against cwd.
